titleStmt.title: SII 9.323: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 323. (A.R. No. 221 of 1918.) ON THE WALL TO THE RIGHT OF THE SOUTHERN ENTRANCE INTO THE MALLIKARJUNA TEMPLE AT KURUVATTI, HARAPANAHALLI TALUK, SAME DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is dated the 7th year of the reign of Hoysaḷa Vīra-Ballāḷadēva, the cyclic year Piṅgala, Jyēshṭha, śu. puṇṇami, Sōmavāra, Sōma-grahaṇa. In A.D. 1197 = Piṅgala which was counted as the 7th year of Ballāḷa II, Jyēshṭha śu. 15 fell on Sunday 1st June; it was neither Monday nor a day of lunar eclipse. The 7th year of none of the other three Ballāḷas corresponds to Piṅgala. The king's Mahāpradhāna Uttarākka-Heggaḍe, Mahadēva-Daṇṇāyaka of Arasiyakeṟe and the Heggaḍe Jannayya are stated to have made a grant of certain cesses (named) raised in Kuṟuvatti, for the service of the god Āhavamallēśvara and handed it over to Lōkābharaṇagurudēva.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . śrīmatu yādavanārāyaṇa pratāpacakravartti hoyisaṇa vīraballāḷadēvavarṣada 7 neya
piṁgaḷasaṁvatsarada jēṣṭha suddha puṇnami sōmavāra sōmagrahaṇa byatīpāta saṁkramāṇadaṁdu śrīmadda
kṣiṇavāraṇāśi kuṟuvattiya śrīyāhumallēśvaradēvara Akhaṁḍadīvige dūpakkeṁdu śrīmanmahāpradhānaṁ U
ttarākkaheggaḍeyuṁ śrīmanmahāpradhānaṁ Arasiyakeṟeya mahadēvadaṇnāyakaruṁ heggaḍe jaṁnayanuṁ
Ā dēvara purada sāda baṇnige magga paṁcakārukarāṇadeṟayaṁ śrīmadrājaguru lōkābharaṇagurudēvargge
Ācaṁdrārkatāraṁbaraṁ saluvaṁtāgi dhārāpūrvvakaṁ māḍi biṭṭa dharmma © maṁgaḷa mahāśrī . Ī dharmmamaṁ śvadharmmadiṁ
pratipāḷisidavargge śrīvāraṇāsiyalu sāyira kapileyanu caturvvēdapālagarappa brāhmaṇarige suvarṇnama
yavāgi koṭṭa phalamakku Ī dharmmamanaḷidāta śrīvāraṇāsiyalu sahasra kapileymaṁ brāhmaṇaruvaṁ koṁda pā
takanakku Īdanavitathameṁdavana bāyalu kōṣṭa mūḍuguṁ .
Digital edition of SII 9.323 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
